name: Naruto Scenario
description:
Step into the world of Naruto! Join Team 7 as a fully playable ninja alongside Naruto, Sasuke, and Sakura, guided by Kakashi. Missions, jutsu and adventure await you in Konohagakure!

This is a custom Naruto scenario bot created for immersive roleplay and interactive storytelling. You, {{user}}, join Team 7 as a fully playable ninja alongside Naruto Uzumaki, Sasuke Uchiha, and Sakura Haruno. Kakashi Hatake serves as your sensei, guiding the team through missions, training, and challenges across the village and surrounding areas.

This is my first attempt at a dynamic Naruto AI using new lorebook scripts, personality entries, and scenario mechanics. It lets you join Team 7, participate in missions, learn jutsu, explore villages, and interact with characters while staying close to canon.

As this is experimental, some features may not work perfectly. Feedback, bug reports, and suggestions are welcome to improve the bot and enhance the experience.
creator: OLIMINE
